page.title: Kila kilichotokea
page.description: Mialiko, michango, malipo, na kila kinachotokea kwenye akaunti yako.

settings.title: Mipangilio ya arifa
settings.description: Chagua kiasi cha taarifa unazotaka kupokea kutoka MoolaHub.

everything.label: Kila kitu
everything.description: Arifa zote: shughuli za duara, hatua za malengo, amana, vikumbusho, na vidokezo.

essential.label: Muhimu
essential.description: Taarifa muhimu tu, kama malipo, tarehe za mwisho za michango, na shughuli za akaunti.

minimal.label: Chache
minimal.description: Arifa muhimu zaidi za akaunti na fedha pekee.

custom.label: Maalum
custom.description: Chagua kwa usahihi aina za arifa unazotaka kupokea.

money.label: Fedha na miamala
money.description: Amana, utoaji, malipo, na vikumbusho vya michango.

social.label: Akiba ya kikundi na kijamii
social.description: Mialiko, shughuli za wanachama, na masasisho ya duara.

engagement.label: Vidokezo na ushiriki
engagement.description: Mfululizo, vikumbusho vya kujifunza, na habari za bidhaa.

notFound.title: Ukurasa haujapatikana
notFound.description: Ukurasa unaoutafuta haupo au huenda umehamishwa.
